title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Ancient Monuments Preservation Act, 1904. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2 [except the State of Jammu and Kashmir].]
footnote: 2. Subs by the A.O. 1950, for sub-section (2). 3. Subs. by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Schedule, for "except Part B States"
